title: Project directory discovery model
description: Replace role-based routing with convention-based project directories. Use project/ for shared issues and project-local/ for personal issues. Discovery is downward from cwd; optional .taskulus file lists additional project paths. Remove contributor/maintainer detection, global fallback, and redirect system. Storage format remains current JSONL; no YAML migration.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Commands discover project/ folders downward from cwd; project-local/ is included when present; .taskulus additional paths supported; contributor/maintainer logic and ~/.beads fallback removed; redirect system removed; no YAML storage introduced.
